Sage Bot Item Code: A308
Rose of the World

Triggers: Once in a while

Viper's Nest
The unit drains the life force from all enemy units for 4 sec. While drained of life force, the enemy units deal 35% less damage and take 35% more damage. Stacks up to 4 times. All enemy units are also afflicted with poisoning. A poisoned enemy unit receives 400000 magic damage for 4 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 1.5% per second.

Requirements: 90-100
